purpose: Per-(community, phase) checklist of inputs that must be present and valid before Per-Lot Output can be computed. Drives check_allocation_readiness. No computation is performed by tools reading this file — they only emit ready/missing/stale checklists.

global_required_inputs.note: Tie-Out check requires this column populated; today it masks the check by being empty.

global_required_inputs.field_path: ClickUp.Lot tasks count by phase x lot_type
global_required_inputs.hard_gate: mda_day_lot_count_check (must equal LotData and Manual Input)

global_required_inputs.field_path: Lot Mix & Pricing.Avg Projected Sales Price
global_required_inputs.note: Master Flagship v3 has zero pricing populated. Satellite PF tab has prices for B2/D1/D2/E1/E2/F/G1/G2/H. Satellite LH tab has assumed prices ($150K SFR, $110K TH, $80K MF, $5.7M Comm).

global_required_inputs.gap_signal: Communities like Parkway Fields and Lomond Heights show $0 land pool in master but have land basis in their satellite (PF Ault Ground $24.96M; LH Ben Lomond 116.39 acres $34.37M). Land pool entries exist outside master.

global_required_inputs.field_path: Indirect Pool entry 'Ault Water' or 'Salem Water Tank' or PF tab Water column
global_required_inputs.note: Master Flagship v3 has no water columns. Method allocation_methods_v1.water_by_letter applies.
Computed at lot sale event per allocation_methods_v1.warranty_at_sale.
Authoritative BCPDev PLJ 2026.03.31 not in repo. Satellite PLJ embeds are slice copies.

global_required_inputs.field_path: BSJ tab — Inventory Asset 12100 by job
QBGL Actuals column on satellite Budgeting section

global_required_inputs.blocking_reason: Without job directory + ITD Actuals + Curr/Adj Budget per job, the Budgeting section cannot resolve the Base column.
global_required_inputs.default_status_today: present (LH and PF satellites carry identical lookup table)

global_required_inputs.current_observation: JCSList has 'Mapping needed' literal in the Phase or QB Job column for many rows — those phases cannot resolve without crosswalk.

global_required_inputs.blocking_reason: Hard gate per CLAUDE.md and project plan. Must pass before allocation may run.
global_required_inputs.default_status_today: two_of_three_typically_available — workbook + landdev; clickup_count needs ClickUp pull

phases.reason: Already allocated; Comments column on satellite shows 'Closed'.

phases.caveat: Direct budget Base is estimated at $60K/lot ($4,560,000) per Comments — confidence medium.
Direct budget Base estimated at $60K/lot ($3,660,000) per Comments.
Direct budget estimated at $60K/lot + $300K commercial. Church already allocated in previous section.

phases.phase: A1 / A2.1 / A2.2 / A2.3 / B1 / C1 / C2 / D2 (other lot types)
blockers: Not present in PF satellite tab as of 2025-10-31. Likely future phases.
#ERROR! in satellite Indirects total cascading from AAJ Capitalized Interest #ERROR!

blockers_summary: Resolve AAJ Capitalized Interest #ERROR! (effective rate calc fails on 30/360 day count or rate field).
Re-validate Indirects pool sum once interest resolves.
Re-validate Sales/Margin formula chain once Indirects resolve.

blockers: No avg_projected_sales_price in master Lot Mix & Pricing
AS 1-3 / AS 4-6 phases trigger range_row_unratified — cannot allocate range-row method
No satellite workbook present for AS
PLJ embedded in LH workbook is unverified slice — needs canonical BCPDev PLJ pull
B1, B2 are 3-tuple (community, phase, lot) communities — must use 3-tuple join discipline per CLAUDE.md
BSJ embed in LH workbook is the only inventory asset visible — needs canonical Salem BSJ pull
Direct budget present for SF B (SFR row only — TH row blank)
No indirect or land pool present in master
Direct budget present for all 3 phases

per_community_phase_requirements.note: Has indirect pool entries ($8.5M Mountain Green Mass Grading + EV Initial Earthwork) but is not represented in Lot Mix & Pricing or Allocation Engine of the master. Add to master before allocation.

compute_only_when: method is ratified in process_rules:allocation_methods_v1 AND
mda_day_lot_count_check has passed (or two-of-three with caveat) AND
phase is not in a range_row category
do_not_allocate: range_row phases (Arrowhead Springs AS 1-3, AS 4-6 buckets and any future range rows)
shell rows where Lot Type = Open
Comm or Church rows when no commercial pricing source is supplied
do_not_invent: Estimated direct budgets (the $60K/lot, $50K/lot, $35K/lot estimates in PF and LH satellites) MUST carry their satellite Comment as caveat in any computed output. Tools must not silently propagate them as if landdev-authoritative.

readiness_status_vocabulary.compute_ready: All required inputs present, method ratified, gates passed. Tool may compute deterministically.
readiness_status_vocabulary.compute_ready_with_caveat: Inputs present but at least one input is an estimate (per satellite Comments). Output must carry caveat.
readiness_status_vocabulary.blocked: One or more required inputs missing OR workbook in error state. Tool returns checklist with missing items, not a computed output.
readiness_status_vocabulary.spec_only: Compute is not in scope for v0.2 for this phase/community — return canonical spec from per_lot_output_schema_v1 instead.
readiness_status_vocabulary.out_of_master_scope: Phase exists in satellite or pool sheets but is missing from master. Surface as a master-extension request.

version_history.author: Agent B
version_history.notes: Initial input requirements from Flagship v3 + LH/PF satellite 2025.10.
